global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a prominent logo and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new hits every week.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo reading 'StarVault' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Stream the hype' in a clear, modern font, centered below the logo.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: Text that says 'New hits every week' in a smaller font, positioned directly below the main message.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Various circular and rectangular shapes in lighter shades of purple, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.description: An abstract shape that does not convey a clear meaning or role.
